news.headline: NeoReach acquires Influencers.com, partners with Blueberry AI to transform the Creator Economy.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Orlando, Florida, NeoReach, a prominent company offering solutions for the Creator Economy, revealed the purchase of Influencers.com. Additionally, they announced a strategic collaboration with Blueberry AI. This move is part of NeoReach's effort to progress in delivering cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Kensington Vanguard National Land Services hires Heather Peterson in Chicago as a senior national commercial escrow officer.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Kensington Vanguard National Land Services (KV), a leading independent national title insurance agency, welcomed Heather Peterson as their new senior national commercial escrow officer. KV, known as one of the largest full-service agencies in the US, strengthens its team with Peterson's expertise in commercial escrow services. This strategic move reinforces KV's position in the market and enhances their capacity to serve clients nationwide.

news.headline: Mike Whitaker becomes Global CIO at BGC Group. Joins Executive Committee. New role to oversee tech strategy.
news.summary: Today, BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) revealed that Mike Whitaker has been appointed as the Global Chief Information Officer and a part of its Executive Committee, said to be a newly established position. Mr. Whitaker will take on the task of structuring and executing strategies pertaining to the company’s information technology across the globe.

news.headline: Ryan Mang appointed as Chief Commercial Officer of DailyPay, leading provider of earned wage access. Rich experience driving growth.
news.summary: Ryan Mang, a highly experienced professional known for driving transformative growth across various industries, has recently joined DailyPay, a prominent worktech company based in New York. Mang has been appointed to a key position within the company. DailyPay specializes in providing earned wage access services and is recognized as a market leader in this sector. The announcement was made on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Former executive Alistair Jessiman appointed to SOCi's advisory board to strengthen expansion into financial services.
news.summary: Alistair Jessiman, NACD.DC, CFA, has joined SOCi, Inc., as part of its Industry Advisory Board to assist in the strategic expansion into financial services. The appointment was made public on Dec. 3, 2024. SOCi is a CoMarketing Cloud platform catering to multi-location enterprises. Jessiman, a former executive, is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company's operations in this sector.

news.headline: Lee Kum Kee teams up with Smoke Queen BBQ for limited-edition Chili Crisp Ribs, available in December only.
news.summary: A renowned maker of Asian sauces and condiments worldwide has collaborated with a finalist from Food Network's 'BBQ Brawl' to create a special dish packed with Asian-influenced flavors. This festive offering will be exclusively available throughout December. The partnership marks a significant milestone for Lee Kum Kee, headquartered in the City of Industry, California. The collaboration is set to bring a unique culinary experience to consumers during this holiday period.

news.headline: Marin County Office of Education, Novato Unified School District, and By the Bay Health team up to tackle healthcare talent shortage.
news.summary: In a collaboration announced on December 3, 2024, three notable organizations in California - the Marin County Office of Education (MCOE), the Novato Unified School District (NUSD), and By the Bay Health, the largest independent nonprofit hospice provider in Northern California - are coming together. This partnership aims to combine expertise and resources to enhance services and support in the region. This alliance is set to impact a significant number of individuals, including students, families, and patients, by leveraging the strengths of each organization to benefit the community.

news.headline: PCORI allocates $156 million to research studies on sleep health, disabilities care, and maternal health in 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 3, 2024, in Washington, new studies funded by the Patient-Centered Outcomes Research Institute (PCORI) aim to fill important gaps in understanding sleep health, care for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities, and maternal health. These studies have received significant funding awards, with the total amount reaching noteworthy numbers.

news.headline: VivaVision's VVN461 shows success in Phase 2 trial for post-cataract surgery inflammation reduction.
news.summary: In a recent study, VVN461, a non-steroidal dual JAK1/TYK2 immunomodulator, successfully met the primary endpoint by showing significant statistical and clinical efficacy in treating post-operative inflammation after cataract surgery. The results revealed noteworthy reductions in inflammation, with significant differences observed compared to the control group. This indicates the potential of VVN461 as an effective treatment option for post-operative inflammation following cataract surgery.

news.headline: Econo-Pak is expanding its Milford, PA facility with a 125,000 sq ft addition to the existing 200,000 sq ft space.
news.summary: A company known as Econo-Pak, esteemed for its contract food packaging and manufacturing services, has revealed an impressive development regarding its Milford, Pennsylvania facility on December 3, 2024. This enhancement encompasses the construction of a 125,000-square-foot extension to the current 200,000-square-foot space...

news.headline: BRC-002 receives FDA orphan drug status for Complex Regional Pain Syndrome. Phase 2 trial to start by end of 2025.Characters: 97
news.summary: A clinical trial launched by an investigator is currently evaluating the safety and effectiveness of a new treatment. Biopharmaceutical Research Company (BRC) intends to start enrolling participants for a Phase 2 trial by the conclusion of 2025. This announcement was made in Monterey, California, on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Rivery launches Snowflake & Amazon Q integration solution for precise business insights. #DataIntegration #Rivery #Snowflake #AmazonQ
news.summary: Businesses have the opportunity to leverage their internal data for GenAI applications, enabling the creation of accurate and current business insights. On December 3, 2024, Rivery, a comprehensive data integration platform facilitating the rapid development of data pipelines, unveiled the introduction of two new tools.

news.headline: Brassfield Estate Winery partners with Southern Glazer's for increased distribution, reaffirms commitment to quality. Approaching 25th anniversary.
news.summary: Brassfield Estate Winery, a renowned winery in California, has entered into a new agreement to strengthen its market presence in North America and globally as it prepares to celebrate its 25th anniversary. The agreement emphasizes the winery's dedication to accessibility and quality. Located in Clearlake Oaks, California, the winery is approaching this milestone with a commitment to expanding its reach. This development comes as Brassfield Estate Winery continues to be recognized as a top player in the wine industry.

news.headline: Risant Health closes Cone Health transaction, adding second health system in 9 months to improve health access.
news.summary: Two organizations are committed to enhancing the healthcare of millions of Americans through the expansion of value-based care. In a press release dated December 3, 2024, Risant Health confirmed it has obtained necessary regulatory clearances and has finalized its operations in Washington and Greensboro, North Carolina.

news.headline: Mike Whitaker appointed as Global CIO at Cantor Fitzgerald. New role involves overseeing technology strategy and implementation.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Cantor Fitzgerald, L.P. welcomed Mike Whitaker as the Global Chief Information Officer and a new addition to the Executive Committee. In his role, Mr. Whitaker will oversee the development and execution of IT strategies for the company. This appointment marks a significant move for Cantor Fitzgerald as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.

news.headline: ERShares Crossover ETF (XOVR) makes history by acquiring SpaceX as its top holding, revolutionizing private equity access for retail investors.
news.summary: In a landmark move, ERShares, a pioneering investment firm known for its innovative investment strategies, has recently launched the first and only Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) that provides retail investors with access to the private equity market. This revolutionary ETF aims to democratize private equity investing and make it accessible to a wider range of investors. The ETF's debut comes hot on the heels of ERShares' historic acquisition of SpaceX. This groundbreaking development occurred on December 3, 2024, and marks a significant milestone in the financial industry. The ETF is set to offer retail investors a unique opportunity to participate in the success of disruptive and entrepreneurial companies. This move is expected to reshape the landscape of private equity investment and attract a substantial number of retail investors seeking exposure to this asset class.

news.headline: Help desk and ticketing software market to hit $7.51 billion by 2031. Tech giants like Zendesk, Genesys, Zoho leading.
news.summary: The worldwide market for help desk and ticketing software is forecasted to experience significant growth, with estimates pointing towards a rise to $7.51 billion by 2031. This notable increase is being fueled by the advantages of omnichannel software, focus on integrating remote work, and the growing acceptance of...

news.headline: American Water Charitable Foundation awards $100K grant to Feeding America for Giving Tuesday, employees receive $100 rewards.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the American Water Charitable Foundation, a 501(c)(3) organization linked to American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., began Giving Tuesday by granting $100,000 to Feeding America to combat food insecurity. Additionally, American Water gave its employees Giving Accounts with a $100 reward each to contribute to eligible charities of their choosing. This initiative aims to make a positive impact on ending hunger and supporting charitable causes.

news.headline: Hitachi Vantara & Virtana team up for AI-enhanced hybrid cloud infra, reducing costs and boosting efficiency. Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A recent collaboration in technology has resulted in the integration of AI monitoring and observability into Hitachi's latest EverFlex infrastructure-as-a-service lineup. This partnership aims to enhance efficiency and drive down costs for users. Hitachi Vantara, a prominent entity in data storage, infrastructure, and hybrid cloud solutions, spearheaded this initiative. The incorporation of AI is set to revolutionize the performance metrics of the new portfolio. This development was formally announced in Santa Clara, California, on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Corvias Military Housing sees improvements in Army survey across seven installations.
news.summary: Corvias' military housing properties at seven installations in Warwick, Rhode Island, reported notable enhancements in the yearly Army Tenant Satisfaction Survey.

news.headline: Important shareholder announcement: DSV's major shareholder discloses stake of 1144.
GEICO Foundation donates $150,000 to Feeding America, providing 7 million+ meals with employees' volunteer service #GivingTuesday.
news.summary: The GEICO Philanthropic Foundation has declared a generous donation of $150,000 to Feeding America®, a key partner in their ongoing efforts to combat hunger in the United States. This donation, announced on #GivingTuesday, emphasizes their dedication to this cause and continues a fruitful three-year collaboration that has already supplied more than seven million meals to communities throughout the country. In addition to financial support, GEICO employees nationwide are actively involved in volunteer efforts, including sorting donations and packaging items, as part of the GEICO Cares program.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops, Nvidia nears buy point; Tesla falls. AI stock soars post earnings. S&P 500 and Nasdaq steady.
news.summary: Early in the trading session on Tuesday, Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline, while both the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq remained stable. Notably, Nvidia saw an increase and was nearing a potential buy point. Meanwhile, Tesla saw a drop in its stock value, and an AI company witnessed a significant surge following their earnings report.

news.headline: South Korean Parliament votes to block president's martial law declaration.
South Korea Parliament opens a session on lifting martial law.
Apollo's Novolex considers bid for Pactiv Evergreen, according to Bloomberg.
Former NBA executive pledges $18M to endow UMD sports management program and support scholarships.
news.summary: Former NBA executive Stephen M. Schanwald, who graduated from the University of Maryland in 1977, has pledged to donate $18 million to his alma mater. The donation will be used to name spaces in athletics facilities at the university in recognition of his contribution. Schanwald, known for his innovative marketing strategies while at the Chicago Bulls, has made this generous commitment to support his university.

news.headline: Festi hf. has received non-binding offers for all outstanding shares in Olíudreifing ehf., as part of the sales process announced in 2024.
news.summary: Festi recently announced the initiation of the sales process for Olíudreifing ehf. on September 26, 2024. The company has received non-binding offers for the acquisition of all outstanding shares in Olíudreifing. This development marks a significant step in the potential sale of the company, indicating interest from potential buyers.

news.headline: Ex-Merck USA President appointed to Klotho Neurosciences’ Board, boosting expertise.
Teradata and AWS team up to offer 'rapid-start' Gen AI use cases through VantageCloud and Amazon Bedrock.
news.summary: In San Diego, Teradata has revealed plans to enhance its partnership with AWS to provide 'rapid-start' Gen AI solutions through VantageCloud and Amazon Bedrock. This collaboration aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to deliver innovative AI applications swiftly and effectively.

news.headline: Innovaccer ACO clients save $1.03B in 2023, earning $636M, with $524 in savings PMPY, surpassing non-Innovaccer ACOs.
news.summary: Innovaccer Inc. revealed that its ACO customers, part of the Medicare Shared Savings Program (MSSP), accumulated $1.03 billion in total savings for Performance Year 2023. These organizations received over $636 million in shared savings payments. Innovaccer ACO customers attained $524 in savings per member per year (PMPY), surpassing the savings rate of non-Innovaccer ACOs per Medicare beneficiary. This success showcases the significant financial impact and efficiency of Innovaccer's approach in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: AKOOL and LiveX AI partner to improve customer engagement with AI and avatar technology. Creating seamless human-like experiences.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between AKOOL, a notable Generative AI platform specializing in personalized visual content, and LiveX AI, a pioneering company in multimodal AI Agents. This alliance aims to revolutionize customer interactions by leveraging LiveX AI's real-time high-precision conversational AI Agents alongside AKOOL's dynamic avatar technology. Together, they are creating human-like, seamless experiences that overcome the constraints typically associated with traditional virtual agents. This collaborative effort is set to enhance customer engagement and satisfaction levels significantly.

news.headline: Survey by IRALOGIX finds about half of retirees lack a structured decumulation strategy, leading to concerns of savings depletion.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, a recent survey has highlighted the difficulties faced by retirees when managing withdrawals from their retirement savings, a process referred to as decumulation. The survey reveals that a substantial portion of retirees do not have a structured plan in place for this stage, opting instead to withdraw funds on an as-needed basis rather than adhering to a consistent decumulation strategy. Surprisingly, only around 25% of respondents indicated that they follow a systematic approach to drawing down their savings during retirement.

news.headline: Fello raises $10.4M for peer support platform addressing loneliness epidemic. Led by former Uber Eats exec, Alyssa Pollack.
news.summary: In Chicago, a new peer support platform called Fello is tackling the issue of loneliness by connecting individuals in need of companionship and advice with others who have faced similar struggles. This innovative platform, spearheaded by former Uber Eats executive Alyssa Pollack, has already raised an impressive $10.4 million in funding. Among the investors is Glen Tullman's 62Ventures. This initiative aims to provide a supportive community for those experiencing loneliness, with Pollack's background in leading Uber Eats to a revenue of $15 billion lending credibility to the project.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: IKON OFFICE SOLUTIONS - Buy - child - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - John Fetterman 
 transaction date: 2024-11-21 
 filed at date: 2024-12-03
US to sell $85 bln 4-week bills on December 5, to settle on December 10.
League recognized as major contender in Everest Group's 2024 PEAK Matrix for Patient and Member Engagement Platforms in Toronto and Chicago. #healthtech
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Toronto and Chicago-based company League was featured in Everest Group's 2024 PEAK Matrix® for Patient and Member Engagement Platforms. The report, part of the Payer and Provider Information Technology research program, highlights League as one of the top solutions in the industry. This recognition signifies League's success and effectiveness in engaging patients and members.

news.headline: Biden's plan would eliminate waiver allowing employers to pay disabled workers less than federal minimum wage.
news.summary: The Biden administration has proposed a plan to eliminate a provision that permits employers to pay employees with disabilities less than the federal minimum wage. This change, if implemented, would affect an estimated number of around 150,000 workers with disabilities currently receiving wages lower than the federal minimum. The new policy aims to promote equal pay and fair treatment for all workers, regardless of any disability they may have.

news.headline: Blockchain technology discussed at Benzinga event, Rarible’s Alex Salnikov highlights wallets and digital identity's role in the metaverse.
news.summary: During the recent Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, there was a focus on the impact of blockchain technology on new economic models. Alex Salnikov, co-founder and chief strategy officer of Rarible, discussed how wallets and digital identities are reshaping engagement in the metaverse. In a panel led by Ian Horne from Money20/20 Amsterdam, Salnikov explored practical approaches and obstacles to blockchain adoption. He emphasized that the metaverse goes beyond visual elements and virtual spaces, highlighting its foundation in financial infrastructure and digital identities. According to Salnikov, the metaverse interface is primarily driven by tools like wallets that facilitate online identity. He noted the importance of understanding the true nature of the metaverse. The article also mentions a Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin market dip following a $2 billion Bitcoin transfer by the US government.

news.headline: 1 in 3 retail associates lack individual mobile devices, per report from Zebra Technologies in the U.S.
news.summary: In Lincolnshire, Illinois, a recent report from Zebra Technologies indicates that 33% of retail associates do not have personal mobile devices.

news.headline: Dassault Aviation reports 30th Nov '24 total shares and voting rights.
ThoroughCare integrates with PointClickCare to improve coordinated care; beneficial for long-term and post-acute providers.
news.summary: ThoroughCare, Inc., a prominent provider of digital healthcare solutions, has successfully integrated its care management software with PointClickCare, a top healthcare technology platform for enhanced care collaboration and immediate patient insights in Pittsburgh. Through the PointClickCare Marketplace, this link will facilitate a seamless, patient-focused healthcare approach for long-term and post-acute care providers. This integration aims to streamline care coordination and improve efficiency in delivering care services.

news.headline: Leidos donates $750,000 to Hampton University in Virginia for scholarships, technology, and student engagement.
news.summary: Leidos, a company listed on the NYSE as LDOS, has revealed their generous donation of $750,000 to Hampton University in Hampton, Virginia. This significant gift aims to support scholarships, enhance technology, and increase student engagement at the university. The contribution will have a far-reaching impact, benefiting numerous students and faculty members in various ways.

news.headline: NASA selects Valid Eval for Phase III SBIR contract to manage Small Business Innovation Research/Small Business Technology Transfer program applications.
news.summary: Today in Denver, on December 3, 2024, Valid Eval disclosed that it has been awarded a Phase III SBIR contract. Valid Eval specializes in secure SaaS platform solutions designed to oversee intricate group evaluations. The company will be utilizing this contract to support NASA's Small Business Innovation Research/Small Business Technology Transfer program. No specific financial details were provided in the announcement.

news.headline: Amerant Bank and Sedano's Supermarkets launch campaign to benefit Centro Mater with reusable shopping bags at all Florida Sedano and Fresco y Mas locations.
news.summary: Colorful reusable shopping bags are now offered at every Sedano and Fresco y Mas store across Florida. These vibrant bags are a sustainable option for customers and are available at all locations of the grocery chains.

news.headline: South Korea Finance Mininstry to convene another emergency meeting on economy and financial markets at 7 AM KST (17:00 ET)
CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ:CLSK) reports Q4 revenue of $89.28M, with 125% full-year 2024 revenue increase. Hashrate grows to 33.5 EH/s. Loss at 27 cents per share.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc's (NASDAQ:CLSK) stock is seeing a decline today following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported revenue of $89.28 million, surpassing analyst predictions of $88.64 million. However, they also revealed a quarterly loss of 27 cents per share, which was higher than the estimated loss of 21 cents per share. Their full-year 2024 revenue increased by 125% compared to the previous year. CleanSpark disclosed that their hashrate reached 33.5 EH/s during the quarter and aims to hit 37 EH/s by the year-end. More details are available on financial news platform Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: OPEC November oil output rises by 180,000 bpd from October to 26.51 million bpd, led by Libya - Survey.
British Airways sponsors $2m Engineering Cadet Scheme in New York, accepting 12 students to become aviation Engineers.
news.summary: A group of twelve students aspiring to become aviation engineers have been offered the opportunity to pursue their dreams through a fully funded cadet scheme by British Airways. This initiative marks British Airways as the first international airline to provide funding for such a program in the United States. The recruitment process has commenced for six engineering cadets from the New York area.

news.headline: Ziebart's "Month of Giving" benefits Mission 22, supports veterans & mental wellness. Troy, Mich, Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Ziebart, a leading automotive aftercare franchise, demonstrates its ongoing commitment to veterans and mental wellness through a holiday initiative in Troy, Michigan on December 3, 2024. The franchise's dedication to the community and supporting veterans is emphasized through this event. Ziebart is recognized as the global leader in premium automotive services.
